zh.Tittleshall, Norfolk, England: 英國諾福爾可迪特萊沙拉爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當William Wayte於1454年出生在英國諾福爾可迪特萊沙拉爾時，他的父親John WAYTE37歲，母親Mrs Margery Ottley28歲。他於大約1484年與Margaret在英國英格蘭諾福爾可結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1496年3月16日在他的家鄉享年42歲。

zh-hans.Tittleshall, Norfolk, England: 英国諾福爾可迪特萊沙拉爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Wayte于1454年出生在英国諾福爾可迪特萊沙拉爾时，他的父亲John WAYTE37岁，母亲Mrs Margery Ottley28岁。他于大约1484年与Margaret在英国英格兰諾福爾可结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1496年3月16日在他的家乡享年42岁。

nameMeanings.name: Wayte
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Waite
meanings: English (of Norman origin): occupational name for a watchman, either in a town or castle, from Anglo-Norman French waite ‘watchman, member of the watch’ (of ancient Germanic origin; compare Wachter ). In the Middle Ages the town waits typically combined the functions of watchmen and musicians through being trumpeters or pipers. There may also have been some late confusion with White or Wheat .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When William Wayte was born in 1454, in Tittleshall, Norfolk, England, his father, John WAYTE, was 37 and his mother, Mrs Margery Ottley, was 28. He married Margaret about 1484, in Norfolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 16 March 1496, in his hometown, at the age of 42.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Wayte est né en 1454, à Tittleshall, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, John WAYTE, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Mrs Margery Ottley, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Margaret environ 1484, à Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 16 mars 1496, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 42 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Wayte 1454 in Tittleshall, Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John WAYTE 37 und seine Mutter Mrs Margery Ottley 28. Er hat um 1484 in Norfolk, England, United Kingdom Margaret geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 16. März 1496 im Alter von 42 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Wayte è nato il nel 1454 nel Tittleshall, Norfolk, England, il suo padre, John WAYTE, aveva 37 anni e il suo madre, Mrs Margery Ottley, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Margaret circa 1484, nel Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 16 marzo 1496, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 42 anni.

ja.Norfolk, England: イギリスイギリスノーフォルク
ja.lifeSummary: William Wayteが1454年にイギリスノーフォルクティットレシャルで生まれた時，父John WAYTEは37歳，母Mrs Margery Ottleyは28歳であった。約1484年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクでMargaretと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1496年3月16日に故郷で42歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William Wayte(이)가 1454년 영국 노르폴크 티틀레샤에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John WAYTE(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs Margery Ottley(은)는 28세였다. 그는 대략 1484년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크에서 Margaret(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1496년 3월 16일 그의 고향에서 42세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Wayte nasceu em 1454, em Tittleshall, Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, John WAYTE, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Mrs Margery Ottley, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret aproximadamente 1484, em Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 16 de março de 1496, em sua cidade natal, com 42 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Wayte родился в 1454 г. в местности титтлешолл, норфолк, Англия, его отцу по имени John WAYTE было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs Margery Ottley, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret около 1484 г. в местности норфолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер 16 марта 1496 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 42 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Wayte nació en 1454, en Tittleshall, Norfolk, Inglaterra, su papá, John WAYTE, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Mrs Margery Ottley, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Margaret aproximadamente 1484, en Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 16 de marzo de 1496, en su pueblo, a la edad de 42 años.
